title: mentha × villosa var. emarginata
intro: Mentha × villosa var. emarginata, also known as woolly mint or emarginate mint, is a variety of the peppermint plant that is characterized by its hairy leaves and white flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestion, reduce nausea and vomiting, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. emarginata include relief from headaches, fever reduction, and improved respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being added to skincare products and used in cooking as a flavoring agent.
